facts_authpayload_access_control_1241829.content: Add a comment whenever a role is intentionally excluded from an access check — it makes the design rationale explicit and saves future readers from questioning the exclusion.

conventions_lms_role_model_1241830890546.content: AdvancedContentEditor is the exercise-editor role (manages exercises) and is distinct from course-manager roles — they should not have course-level read access by design.

facts_code_review_3797636122155.content: Adding a clarifying comment is a valid fix when the behavior is correct by design but not self-explanatory to future readers.

thoughts_lmspermissions_3797637550988.content: AdvancedContentEditor is an exercise-editor role, not a course-manager role — intentionally excluded from instructor list read access.

facts_pr_workflow_3797638808744.content: When fixing review feedback, prefer the minimal appropriate solution rather than over-engineering.
